title: Fpv Elytra
description: A complete overhaul of the elytra with insane shaders and optimization to make the elytra feel like an fpv drone
body:
This is a modpack made to transform elytras into FPV Drones.
It uses the best performances mods out there and lots of other mods.

  I recommand using 20 chuncks of render distance but you can experiment with it
  Go into **F1** while flying for a better experience
  Go look into the keybinds for the Do A Barrel Roll mod, its **essential to use the thruster      mechanique**

  Remember, have fun and **Enjoy!**

  A reddit for bug repporting and questions: [https://www.reddit.com/r/FPVelytraMod/](https://www.reddit.com/r/FPVelytraMod/)

  **VR support is under developpement**

  Check Out My Other Projects! 

  Simple Vanilla + :[https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-vanilla-+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-vanilla-+)

  Simply Superior : [https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-vanilla-+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-vanilla-+)
